product_visual_description: Auricolare Bluetooth singolo con gancio auricolare flessibile di colore nero opaco. Il corpo principale è una capsula ovale/cilindrica nera con finitura lucida, dotata di un anello LED blu elettrico luminoso (circa 270°, aperto in basso a sinistra) al centro del pannello touch. Sul lato opposto sporge un ear tip in silicone nero con doppio strato conico. Il gancio auricolare è un arco flessibile in gomma nera morbida, con un'aletta piatta triangolare all'estremità superiore per l'aggancio al padiglione auricolare. Il prodotto è prevalentemente nero con l'unico elemento cromatico costituito dal LED blu (#1E90FF). Dimensioni compatte, design ergonomico ed essenziale.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Auricolare Bluetooth In-Ear Wireless V5.2 (AR1N).
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- Images 02, 04, 06, 09: integrate the brand logo (SECOND image_input) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner following LOGO INTEGRATION RULES.
- Images 01a, 01b, 03, 05, 07, 08: NO logo, NO empty space reserved, fill the full composition.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER', or similar AS TEXT in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

images.name: Hero Sfondo Bianco
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Auricolare Bluetooth In-Ear Wireless V5.2 (AR1N).
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: NO_LOGO for this image. DO NOT ADD ANY LOGO, BRAND NAME, WATERMARK, OR PLACEHOLDER. Fill the full composition.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:

STEP 1 — PLACE THE PRODUCT:
Extract the GiDaCom AR1N auricolare Bluetooth from the reference photo as a pixel-perfect photographic cutout.
The product is a single black Bluetooth earphone with a flexible ear hook arc in matte black rubber, an oval/cylindrical glossy black capsule body featuring a glowing blue LED ring (~270° arc, open at bottom-left, color #1E90FF), and a dual-layer conical silicone ear tip in black on the right side. The flat triangular clip tip is visible at the top of the hook.
Position the product centered in the frame, slightly above center (product occupying approximately 65% of the canvas height). Angle: slight 15° clockwise tilt so the LED ring faces the viewer prominently. The ear tip points to the right.

STEP 2 — BACKGROUND:
Pure white background: RGB(255, 255, 255). Absolutely no gradient, no shadow, no texture, no vignette, no border.
Zero text. Zero logo. Zero graphic elements. Zero effects.
The product must appear as a clean commercial Amazon main image — nothing else in the frame.

Negative: No redrawn product. No illustrated style. No glow ON the product. No effects touching the product. No text. No logo. No watermark. No background color other than pure white.

Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO SONIC BURST:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Extract the GiDaCom AR1N auricolare Bluetooth as a PIXEL-PERFECT photographic cutout.
The product: matte black flexible ear hook arc, glossy black oval capsule body with a glowing blue LED ring (#1E90FF, ~270° arc open at bottom-left), dual-layer conical black silicone ear tip on the right, flat triangular clip at the top of the hook.
Position: centered in the canvas, occupying ~70% of the canvas height. Slight 15° clockwise tilt, LED ring facing the viewer. The product is on a SEPARATE LAYER — it is the TOP layer, untouchable.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE. Maintain as a separate layer always.
If any background effect bleeds onto the product — FAILURE.

STEP 2 — ADD BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Background base: deep navy-to-black radial gradient, center #0D1B3E, edges #050810.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the product — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the product cutout:
- SONIC BURST: explosive concentric audio wave arcs radiating from the center-right of the canvas (origin near the LED ring position in the background layer). Arc lines are electric blue (#1E90FF) and cyan-white (#7DF9FF), varying thickness from 2px to 6px, fading from 90% opacity near origin to 5% at canvas edges.
- 5-7 main arcs at irregular radii (120px, 240px, 380px, 500px, 640px, 780px, 900px from origin).
- Between arcs: scattered tiny dots/particles (#1E90FF, 1-3px, opacity 20-60%) representing floating audio particles.
- Prismatic light streaks: 3-4 thin diagonal light rays (#FFFFFF, 1px, 15% opacity) crossing diagonally behind the product.
- Bluetooth symbol motif: very faint (#1E90FF, 4% opacity) large Bluetooth icon (300px) centered behind the product body as a ghost watermark pattern.
- Bottom-left and top-right corners: subtle lens flare circles (#1E90FF, 8% opacity, 60px radius) adding depth.
The entire effect exists ONLY behind the product. Zero bleed onto the product silhouette.
NO text. NO logos. NO watermarks. NO empty reserved space.

Negative: No redrawn product. No glow ON the product. No effect touching the product. No text. No logo. No English text.

Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:

Background: dark navy gradient left-to-right, #080C1A (left) to #0D1B3E (right). Subtle geometric hexagonal mesh pattern overlay at 4% opacity in #1E90FF. No solid color blocks.

LEFT 55% of canvas: product cutout (pixel-perfect from reference) of the GiDaCom AR1N auricolare Bluetooth. Position: vertically centered, product occupying ~75% of the left zone height. The LED ring (#1E90FF) glows naturally as captured in the photo. A very subtle drop shadow falls on the background only (NOT on the product): soft blue-black shadow, 30px blur, 15px offset right-down, 25% opacity — shadow touches ONLY the background layer.

RIGHT 45% of canvas: benefit text block, vertically centered.
TOP of right zone: bold white italic heading (font-size ~52px):
"SUONO SENZA LIMITI"
Subheading below (font-size 28px, #1E90FF, light weight): "5 motivi per sceglierlo"
Thin horizontal separator line (#1E90FF, 1px, 80% width of right zone).

Then 5 benefit rows, each row: checkmark icon (✓, #1E90FF, bold, 36px) + white bold text (font-size 34px), with thin 0.5px #1E90FF separator between rows:
✓ Bluetooth 5.2 ultra-stabile
✓ Cancellazione rumore CVC 6.0
✓ Solo 12g, comfort tutto il giorno
✓ Resistente a sudore e acqua
✓ Ricarica rapida in 1,5 ore

BOTTOM of right zone: small accent pill badge (#1E90FF background, white text, 24px): "Controllo touch · Microfono HD"

Fill the entire canvas — no empty corner, no dead space.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

Negative: No redrawn product. No glow ON the product. No effect touching the product. No English text. No placeholder.

IMAGE 07 — LIFESTYLE:

Show a fit male runner, approximately 30-35 years old, with natural athletic build, wearing the GiDaCom AR1N Bluetooth earphone on his right ear. The earphone is the pixel-perfect photographic cutout from the reference photo, composited realistically onto his ear — the black flexible hook visibly wrapping the outer ear, the glossy capsule with the blue LED ring (#1E90FF) subtly visible.

Setting: an urban street or park path at golden hour (late afternoon sun, approximately 5-6pm). The background is a softly bokeh-blurred cityscape or tree-lined path — warm amber and deep blue bokeh circles, blurred asphalt, natural depth of field (f/1.8 equivalent). The background colors shift from warm golden (#C8860A tones) at the bottom-right to cooler blue-violet (#2A3F6E) at the top-left.

The person: natural running posture, slight forward lean, left arm partially swinging. Expression: relaxed, confident, focused — not staged, not smiling directly at camera. Eyes forward, natural gaze. Wearing a dark charcoal athletic top and black running shorts. Sweat-realistic skin tone, no heavy makeup.

Composition: the person occupies approximately 70% of the canvas height, positioned center-right (face at about 60% from left, 25% from top). The auricolare on the right ear is clearly visible and identifiable.

Photographic feel: editorial sports photography, natural lighting, no studio feel. Lens: telephoto compression, subject sharp, background soft. Color grade: slightly desaturated with lifted shadows, warm highlights.

NO text overlays. NO graphic overlays. NO logo space. NO watermarks. Pure lifestyle photography composition.

Negative: No redrawn product. No illustrated style. No effect on the product. No text in image. No logo. No English text. No flat graphic elements.

images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:

You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Auricolare Bluetooth In-Ear Wireless V5.2 (AR1N).

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.

Background: deep dark blue-black #060A14 with very faint radial gradient center #0A1226 to edges #040709. Four-quadrant grid layout. Subtle thin grid cross lines in the center (1px, #1E90FF, 15% opacity) dividing the 4 quadrants.

MAIN AREA: 2×2 grid, 4 scenario cards. Each card occupies one quadrant of approximately 880×700px. Cards have background #0D1525, rounded corners 16px, border 1.5px #1E90FF, internal padding 30px.

CARD TOP-LEFT:

Subtext (font-size 24px, #AAAAAA): "Call, video meeting, smart working"

CARD BOTTOM-LEFT:
Icon: airplane silhouette, #1E90FF, 70px.
Title (font-size 38px, white bold): "VIAGGIO"
Subtext (font-size 24px, #AAAAAA): "In volo, in treno, ovunque"
Small accent dot bottom-right.

CARD BOTTOM-RIGHT:

Title (font-size 38px, white bold): "RELAX"
Subtext (font-size 24px, #AAAAAA): "Musica, podcast, audiolibri"
Small accent dot bottom-right.

BOTTOM CENTER (below the 2×2 grid): product cutout (GiDaCom AR1N, pixel-perfect) centered horizontally, occupying ~20% of canvas height, sitting just above the bottom edge. On each side of the product: accent text in #1E90FF (font-size 24px) — LEFT: "Bluetooth 5.2" — RIGHT: "IPX Resistente". White centered caption below product (font-size 22px, #AAAAAA): "Un auricolare. Infinite possibilità."

Full canvas 2000×2000 filled with content — no dead space.

This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.

THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.

If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IMAGE 09 — GARANZIA E TRUST:

Background: very deep midnight #07090F with a faint repeating diamond/rhombus geometric pattern at 4% opacity in #1E90FF. Outer edge: very subtle vignette darkening to pure black at corners. Overall mood: premium, reassuring, serious.

OUTER FRAME: thin border 3px #1E90FF at 80% opacity, inset 20px from all canvas edges.

TOP CENTER:

Full-width horizontal rule (#1E90FF, 2px).

MAIN AREA: 2×2 grid of 4 trust cards. Each card: ~840×580px, background #0F1525, border 1.5px #1E90FF, rounded 20px, padding 40px.

BOTTOM CENTER (below the 2×2 grid): product cutout (GiDaCom AR1N, pixel-perfect), centered horizontally, occupying ~18% of canvas height. On each side of the product in #1E90FF text (font-size 22px): LEFT: "AR1N · Modello" — RIGHT: "V5.2 · CVC 6.0".
Below product: white text centered (font-size 24px): "Scelto da chi non scende a compromessi."

Full 2000×2000 canvas filled — no dead space.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

Negative: No redrawn product. No glow ON the product. No English text. No placeholder.

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except brand names if inevitable). No supplier brand names or logos. No placeholder text like 'LOGO HERE', '[BRAND]', 'LOGO CLIENTE', 'YOUR LOGO', 'BRAND HERE'. No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word 'LOGO' anywhere in the image.
